steps.title: Convert cubic meters to cubic centimeters
steps.content:
Use the length conversion $$1\text{ m}=100\text{ cm}$$ to get the volume conversion:
$$(1\text{ m})^3 = (100\text{ cm})^3 = 1{,}000{,}000\text{ cm}^3$$
Then multiply by the given volume:
$$0.84\text{ m}^3 = 0.84 \times 1{,}000{,}000\text{ cm}^3 = 840{,}000\text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Convert cubic centimeters to quarts
steps.content:
Use the given equivalence $$946.35\text{ cm}^3 = 1\text{ quart}$$ to convert:
$$\text{quarts} = \frac{840{,}000\text{ cm}^3}{946.35\text{ cm}^3/\text{quart}} \approx 887.6\text{ quarts}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
